# KAFKA_TOPICS.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - Kafka Skill Agent (A20) -- test event production and assertion
#   - Event Schema Agent (A21) -- schema governance
#   - SRE Agent (A38) -- consumer lag monitoring
#   - Observability Setup Agent (A37) -- Kafka panel registration
#
# If this service does not use Kafka, write "Not applicable" below
# and leave the tables empty.
#
# Topic naming convention: {domain}.{entity}.{event-type}
# All lowercase, present/past tense for events.
# Example: order.order.placed, order.order.cancelled
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.

---

## Not applicable

[Delete this line and fill in the tables below if the service uses Kafka]

---

## Topics we produce to

| Topic name | Schema format | Schema registry URL | DLQ topic | SLA (max lag) | Contains PII |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [domain.entity.event] | Avro / JSON | [registry URL] | [topic]-dlq | [N messages] | Yes / No |

---

## Topics we consume from

| Topic name | Consumer group | Offset policy | DLQ handling | Contains PII |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [domain.entity.event] | [service]-[topic]-consumer | At-least-once / Exactly-once | [strategy] | Yes / No |

---

## Topic detail

### [topic-name] (producer)

**Event type:** [EventClass or schema name]
**Published when:** [What business event triggers this]
**Key field:** [Partition key field -- e.g. orderId]
**Payload summary:** [Key fields in the event payload]
**Schema version:** [Current registered version]
**PII fields:** [List any personal data fields, or "None"]

### [topic-name] (consumer)

**Consumed by:** [Module name from MODULE_REGISTRY.md]
**Processing logic:** [What this service does with the event]
**Idempotency:** [How duplicate events are handled]
**DLQ policy:** [When events go to DLQ and how they are processed]
